title: Gawilghur Fort

overview.short: Gawilghur (also, Gawilgarh or Gawilgad, Pronunciation: [ɡaːʋilɡəɖ]) was a well-fortified mountain stronghold of the Maratha Empire north of the Deccan Plateau, in the vicinity of S
overview.description: Gawilghur (also, Gawilgarh or Gawilgad, Pronunciation: [ɡaːʋilɡəɖ]) was a well-fortified mountain stronghold of the Maratha Empire north of the Deccan Plateau, in the vicinity of Satpura Ranges, Amravati District, Maharashtra. It was successfully assaulted by a force commanded by Arthur Wellesley on 15 December 1803 during the Second Anglo-Maratha War.

topPlaces.name: Somwarkheda
topPlaces.description: Somwarkheda or Somwar Kheda is a village located in Chikhaldara Tehsil of Amravati district in Maharashtra, India. It is situated 38 km away from sub-district headquarter Chikhaldara and 73 km away from district headquarter Amravati.

topPlaces.name: Chandrabhaga Dam (Amravati)
topPlaces.description: Chandrabhaga Dam, is an earthfill dam on Chandrabhaga river near Amravati in state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Somwarkheda or Somwar Kheda is a village located in Chikhaldara Tehsil of Amravati district in Maharashtra, India. It is situated 38 km away from sub-district headquarter Chikhaldara and 73 km away from district headquarter Amravati.
Chandrabhaga Dam, is an earthfill dam on Chandrabhaga river near Amravati in state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gawilghur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gawilghur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gawilghur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (180 km) and the nearest railway station is Itarsi Junction (144 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gawilghur Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gawilghur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gawilghur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Gawilghur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gawilghur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Somwarkheda, Chandrabhaga Dam (Amravati).
